safety.setup: Creates one temporary metaobject definition and one temporary metaobject entry on the disposable conformance shop, then deletes both before writing the successful fixture.
safety.paritySpecs: The checked-in parity spec replays setup through public GraphQL mutations and compares readback payloads against this Shopify capture.

node.name: Material
node.description: Defines a product's primary material, such as cotton or wool

fieldDefinitions.name: Base material
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

node.name: Todo
node.description: A single todo list item, stored as a metaobject.

fieldDefinitions.name: Done
fieldDefinitions.description: Whether the todo is completed.

fieldDefinitions.name: Position
fieldDefinitions.description: Sort order — lower shows first.

fieldDefinitions.name: Title
fieldDefinitions.description: What needs doing.

node.name: Production Batch
node.description: A single production run of a product, with its lab tests and traceability info.

fieldDefinitions.name: Lab Tests
fieldDefinitions.description: All lab tests run on this batch

fieldDefinitions.name: Product
fieldDefinitions.description: The product this batch was produced for

fieldDefinitions.name: Quantity Produced
fieldDefinitions.description: Units produced in this batch

fieldDefinitions.name: Status
fieldDefinitions.description: released, quarantined, or recalled

node.name: Lab Test
node.description: A single quality-control test performed on a production batch.

fieldDefinitions.name: Acceptable Range
fieldDefinitions.description: Spec / acceptance criteria (e.g. '4.5 – 6.0')

fieldDefinitions.name: Lab Report
fieldDefinitions.description: PDF or image of the full lab report

fieldDefinitions.name: Passed
fieldDefinitions.description: Whether the result is within the acceptable range

fieldDefinitions.name: Result
fieldDefinitions.description: Measured value (e.g. '5.4', '<10 CFU/g')

fieldDefinitions.name: Test Name
fieldDefinitions.description: e.g. pH, Microbial, Viscosity, Heavy Metals

fieldDefinitions.name: Tested By
fieldDefinitions.description: Lab or technician that ran the test
